upstream.checkpoint_revision: set at download time in registry.json

model_properties.resolution_notes: upstream checkpoint is trained on ADE20K; MicroSeg remaps the head to binary labels

Swin Transformer: Hierarchical Vision Transformer using Shifted Windows

remarks: Classifier head is reinitialized for 2-label binary segmentation in MicroSeg.
Use local_files_only mode in air-gapped runs.
Checksum validation should be enabled before training.
